channel.title: Posts on IMS384 Rhetoric of Games
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on IMS384 Rhetoric of Games

item.title: Welcome Friends
item.description: Welcome back! You’re receiving this note because you are currently registered for at least one of my classes this semester: IMS211 (Introduction to Game Studies); IMS212 (Introduction to Game Design); IMS384 (Rhetoric of Games). IMS211, IMS212 My sections of IMS211 and IMS212 are both “hybrid synchronous” courses. For our purposes, that means that you have a choice: Choice A: Twice weekly, at the appointed hour, from your dorm room, your apartment, your RV, or even your pool, you will join us for class.
